# The Sacred Seer Toni Love

The Sacred Seer Toni Love is a woman-owned spiritual business led by intuitive healer and guide Toni Love, offering Holy Spirit-led readings, angelic guidance, soul healing, past life insight, and energy healing. The brand carries a heavenly, angelic aesthetic — soft gold, white, and celestial blue with glowing light effects, sacred geometry, feathers, and divine energy visuals. Rooted in connection to God, Holy Spirit, and Yeshua, the brand feels compassionately spiritual and awakening without being church-like, evoking a sacred online sanctuary that is emotionally healing, visually luxurious, and deeply authentic.

Source: https://example.com

---

## milford spiritual center — The Sacred Seer Toni Love

Sacred Spiritual Guidance



# Awaken Your Soul'sDivine Path






### Holy Spirit-led intuitive guidance, healing, and soul insight — reconnect with peace, clarity, purpose, and divine truth.



Book a Session
Receive Guidance




✦ Compassionate spiritual support rooted in God, Holy Spirit & divine love ✦































Meet Your Guide


## A Compassionate Lighton Your Sacred Journey


Toni Love is an intuitive healer and Holy Spirit-led spiritual guide whose gift is helping souls remember who they truly are. Rooted in divine love and guided by the Holy Spirit, Yeshua, and the angelic realm, Toni offers a warm, non-dogmatic sanctuary — a milford spiritual center of the heart — where every reading, healing, and session is held in compassion, clarity, and sacred truth.


Whether you are navigating a crossroads, seeking soul remembrance, or simply longing to feel seen and guided, Toni meets you exactly where you are. Her work is not about religion — it is about your living, breathing connection to the Divine and the wisdom your soul has always carried.




Areas of Sacred Service


- Intuitive Readings

- Soul Healing

- Angelic Guidance

- Spiritual Awakening

- Energy Healing

- Starseed Insight

- Emotional Clarity

- Compassionate Support





Authentic connection over doctrine — your soul knows the way.

Discover Toni's Story














Toni Love
Intuitive Healer & Sacred Seer
































Sacred Offerings

## Divine Guidance for Your Soul's Journey



Each session is a sacred space held in Holy Spirit love — designed to bring clarity, healing, remembrance, and divine confirmation to exactly where you are right now.













### Holy Spirit Insight Readings


Receive Spirit-led messages directly from the heart of God. These readings illuminate your path, confirm your next steps, and bring deep peace to questions your soul has been carrying.

Book Now










### Angelic Guidance Sessions


Connect with your angelic team and receive loving messages of encouragement, direction, and divine reassurance. Your angels are always speaking — this session helps you hear them clearly.

Book Now










### Soul Healing Sessions


A gentle, Spirit-guided healing experience that addresses wounds held in the soul — grief, fear, trauma, and disconnection. Leave feeling lighter, restored, and held in divine love.

Book Now










### Past Life Insight


Explore the soul memories that shape your present patterns, relationships, and gifts. Past life insight brings profound remembrance, compassion for yourself, and freedom from cycles that no longer serve you.

Book Now










### Twin Flame & Soul Connection Guidance


Navigate the sacred complexity of twin flame and soul connection journeys with Spirit-led clarity. Receive divine perspective on separation, reunion, purpose, and the higher calling within your connection.

Book Now










### Energy Healing


A restorative session that clears energetic blockages, realigns your field with divine light, and replenishes your spiritual vitality. Ideal for those feeling depleted, scattered, or spiritually disconnected.

Book Now

















### Spiritual Awakening Support


You are not alone in your awakening. This sacred support session is designed for souls in the midst of a profound spiritual shift — offering grounding, clarity, and compassionate guidance as you step into your divine identity and purpose. Whether you are a spiritual renewal center for yourself or seeking a guide for the journey, Toni Love walks alongside you with Holy Spirit wisdom.

Book Your Session


























Words From the Awakened


## Lives Touched by Divine Guidance



Each reading, each healing session, each sacred conversation carries the breath of the Holy Spirit. These are the words of those who arrived searching — and left transformed.







Deep Peace
Stillness that settles the soul




Radiant Clarity
Direction where there was confusion




Sacred Healing
Wounds released, wholeness restored









“


I came to Toni completely overwhelmed — my mind wouldn't stop racing and I felt disconnected from everything. Within minutes of our session, something in me just... settled. It was like the Holy Spirit wrapped a blanket around my soul. I left with a peace I hadn't felt in years. I still carry it with me every single day.







M

Michelle R.
Soul Healing Session








“


Toni said things that no one could have known — details about my grandmother, words she used, a specific memory from my childhood. I felt completely seen and validated in my faith. It confirmed everything I had been sensing in my spirit but doubted. God truly speaks through her. This was divine confirmation I had been praying for.







D

Danielle T.
Holy Spirit-Led Reading








“


I had been stuck at a crossroads for two years — a career change, a relationship ending, and a deep spiritual fog I couldn't shake. My session with Toni was a breakthrough I didn't see coming. She illuminated the path so clearly. The confusion just dissolved. I finally knew which direction to walk in, and I walked out of that call a different woman.







A

Aisha K.
Spiritual Guidance Session








“


What I wasn't expecting was how loved I would feel. Toni doesn't just give you information — she holds space with such tenderness and grace. The angelic messages she shared made me weep with gratitude. I felt Yeshua's presence in that session in a way I never have before. She is a true gift from Heaven.







S

Serena W.
Angel Message Reading








“


The past life insight session unlocked something I had been carrying for decades without understanding why. Toni gently guided me through it with such wisdom and compassion. Patterns in my life that never made sense suddenly became clear. The energy healing that followed was profound — I felt lighter than I ever have in my adult life.







L

Lydia P.
Past Life & Energy Healing








“


I was skeptical at first — I had tried other spiritual readers and left feeling empty. With Toni, every word resonated at a soul level. She spoke truth with love, not fear. My spiritual renewal began the moment she said, "God sees your faithfulness." I have returned three times and each session brings deeper healing and joy.







C

Carmen J.
Intuitive Reading & Renewal











Ready to experience your own divine breakthrough?

## Meet the Intuitive Guide Behind Your Healing — The Sacred Seer Toni Love

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Discover how Toni Love&#39;s Holy Spirit-led gifts of angelic insight and energy healing have transformed lives. Your journey to new vision and spiritual living begins with her sacred story.

Meet the Intuitive Guide Behind Your Healing — The Sacred Seer Toni Love






























Skip to main content















- Home
- About
- Services



Contact























Intuitive Healer & Spiritual Guide




# Meet Toni Love —Called to Guide, Heal & Illuminate




Toni Love is a Holy Spirit-led intuitive healer and sacred guide whose calling was born from a deep, personal encounter with divine love. Through angelic guidance, soul healing, past life insight, and energy healing, she creates a safe and luminous space where truth is heard, wounds are released, and the soul remembers its purpose.


Rooted in her connection to God, Holy Spirit, and Yeshua, Toni's work is not about religion — it is about relationship. Every session is a sacred encounter, a moment of divine clarity where you are seen, heard, and gently guided back to the peace and purpose that was always yours. Whether you are seeking answers, healing from the past, or simply longing to feel connected to something greater, Toni meets you exactly where you are — with compassion, wisdom, and unwavering love.


As a milford spiritual center for seekers across the world, The Sacred Seer offers a sanctuary without walls — a place of spiritual renewal and awakening available to you wherever you are on your journey.
































✦
Toni Love — Holy Spirit-Led Intuitive Healer & Sacred Guide
✦


















































Meet Your Guide





## A Sacred Path, Walked With Love


Toni Love is an intuitive healer, Holy Spirit-led reader, and compassionate guide whose gifts were not chosen — they were given. For years, Toni walked a path of deep spiritual seeking, moving through seasons of healing, loss, and divine awakening, until she could no longer ignore the sacred calling placed upon her heart. Today, as the founder of The Sacred Seer, she offers what she once desperately needed herself: clarity, comfort, and connection to the divine.


Guided by the Holy Spirit, Toni delivers angelic messages, soul remembrance support, past life insight, and energy healing with a precision and warmth that her clients describe as life-changing. Her work is rooted in her relationship with God, Yeshua, and the angelic realm — not in doctrine or ritual, but in authentic, living connection. As a woman-owned spiritual practice, The Sacred Seer stands as a sanctuary for those who are ready to awaken, remember, and return to wholeness.


Whether you are navigating grief, seeking direction, longing for emotional clarity, or simply feeling called to go deeper — Toni meets you exactly where you are. Her sessions are infused with discernment, unconditional love, and a sacred presence that holds space for your soul's most honest questions. This is not a church. This is a divine encounter.








### Toni's Spiritual Approach


Every session is Holy Spirit-led, angel-supported, and deeply personal. Toni brings together intuitive reading, soul-level healing, and compassionate guidance to create a sacred space where transformation is not just possible — it is expected. Her practice honors your unique divine journey with authenticity, discernment, and love.





Book a Sacred Session




















Our Sacred Commitments

## The Principles That Guide Every Reading



At The Sacred Seer, every session is held within a container of divine love, spiritual integrity, and compassionate presence — a true spiritual renewal center for your soul's journey.













### Compassionate Support


Toni holds every soul with tenderness and grace, creating an emotionally safe space where you are seen, heard, and honored without judgment. You are never alone on this sacred path.












### Holy Spirit Discernment


Every reading is surrendered to the Holy Spirit, Yeshua, and divine angelic guidance. Toni does not speak from ego — she listens, receives, and delivers messages rooted in divine truth and clarity.












### Healing Presence


Soul healing is woven into every interaction. Whether through energy work, past life insight, or angelic messages, Toni's presence channels divine light that soothes, restores, and awakens your spirit.












### Authentic Soul Guidance


Toni honors your free will above all. Guidance is offered with honesty, love, and divine respect — never fear-based, always empowering. You leave each session with clarity, confidence, and a deeper trust in your own divine path.





















Your Sacred Journey

## What to Expect When You Work With Toni



Each session is thoughtfully designed to bring you peace, confirmation, healing, and the next-step clarity your soul has been seeking. Here is how your journey unfolds.









01






### Reach Out & Connect


Begin by reaching out through the contact page or booking link. Share a little about what you are seeking — whether it is spiritual clarity, soul healing, angelic guidance, or confirmation on your path. Toni will hold your inquiry with care and compassion.













02






### Choose Your Session


Browse the offerings and select the session that resonates with your soul's current need — from Holy Spirit-led intuitive readings and angel messages to past life insight, energy healing, or soul guidance. Every service is lovingly tailored to meet you exactly where you are.













03






### Receive Your Guidance


Sessions are held via Google Meet or delivered remotely, allowing you to receive divine guidance from the comfort of your own sacred space. Toni connects through the Holy Spirit to bring you messages, healing energy, and insight with warmth, clarity, and love.













04






### Integrate & Awaken


After your session, Toni encourages gentle reflection and integration of the insights received. You will leave with peace in your heart, confirmation of your path, and clear next steps for your spiritual renewal — carrying the light of divine love forward into your daily life.











Ready to begin your sacred journey? Sessions are offered online, welcoming souls from every corner of the world seeking spiritual renewal and divine connection.

Book a Session



















Sacred Testimonials

## Words From Those Who Have Been Seen


Every soul that walks this path leaves transformed. These are their words — offered with gratitude and love.













"I came to Toni at the lowest point of my life — uncertain, grieving, and desperate for clarity. From the very first moment, I felt completely held by something greater than any human conversation. Toni didn't just read my energy; she saw my soul. She spoke words that only God and I could have known, and in that sacred space, I felt the Holy Spirit move through every word she shared. I left that session with a peace that surpassed all understanding. My life has genuinely changed. Toni is a true vessel of divine love."




M


Melissa R.
Soul Healing Session























"Toni confirmed things about my past life that I had been carrying silently for years. I finally understand why I kept repeating certain patterns. This was the divine timing I had been praying for. I felt completely seen, without judgment — only compassion and light."




J


Janelle T.
Past Life Insight Session


















"The angelic guidance Toni channeled brought me to tears — tears of relief, not sadness. She spoke directly to the wounds I had never voiced. I walked away feeling lighter, anchored in faith, and deeply loved by something divine. I recommend her to every seeking soul."




S


Serena W.
Angelic Guidance Reading





















Your healing, clarity, and divine connection are waiting. When you are ready, Toni is here.


Explore Sacred Services

Guiding souls toward clarity, healing, and divine alignment. Step into your sacred journey with compassion and light.

Sacred Offerings


# Divine Guidance for EveryStep of Your Journey


Each session offered through The Sacred Seer is Holy Spirit-led — a compassionate space where clarity, healing, and divine truth meet your soul exactly where it is. Whether you seek angelic guidance, energy healing, past life insight, or spiritual awakening support, every offering is designed to illuminate your path and restore alignment with your highest self.













Intuitive Guidance










Energy Healing










Soul Connection

























Sacred Offerings

## Divine Services for Your Soul's Journey


Each session is a sacred space held in love, guided by the Holy Spirit, and tailored to meet you exactly where you are on your path.


















### Holy Spirit Insight Readings


Receive direct, Spirit-led messages that speak to the deepest questions of your heart. These readings bring clarity, confirmation, and divine comfort — helping you trust the path unfolding before you.


- Clarity on life purpose and divine direction

- Confirmation of decisions weighing on your heart

- Messages of comfort, hope, and spiritual reassurance



Book a Reading











### Angelic Guidance Sessions


Connect with the angelic realm through Toni's intuitive channel. Your angels are always speaking — this session helps you hear their loving guidance with clarity and confidence.


- Messages from your personal guardian angels

- Angelic support for healing emotional wounds

- Guidance on relationships, transitions, and new beginnings



Book a Session











### Soul Healing Sessions


A deeply compassionate space where old wounds are gently met with divine light. Soul healing addresses the root of emotional pain, spiritual disconnection, and patterns that no longer serve your highest good.


- Releasing grief, trauma, and emotional blockages

- Restoring your sense of wholeness and self-worth

- Reconnecting with your divine identity and inner peace



Begin Healing











### Past Life Insight


Illuminate the soul contracts, unresolved lessons, and recurring patterns carried across lifetimes. Understanding your past lives brings profound freedom and accelerates your spiritual growth in this lifetime.


- Uncovering karmic patterns affecting your present life

- Healing soul-level wounds from previous incarnations

- Understanding your soul's mission across time



Explore Your Past











### Twin Flame & Soul Connection Guidance


Navigate the sacred complexity of deep soul connections with clarity and grace. Whether you are in union, separation, or searching, this guidance brings divine perspective to your most profound relationships.


- Understanding the spiritual purpose of your connection

- Navigating separation with peace and divine trust

- Aligning your energy for harmonious soul union



Seek Guidance











### Energy Healing


Restore balance, clear stagnant energy, and realign your entire being with divine light. Energy healing works on the subtle body to release what is draining you and replenish what has been depleted.


- Clearing energetic blockages and attachments

- Chakra balancing and aura cleansing

- Restoring vitality, joy, and spiritual flow



Restore Your Energy











### Spiritual Awakening Support


Awakening can feel disorienting, even overwhelming. This dedicated support session offers grounded, Spirit-led companionship as you navigate the expansion of your consciousness and step fully into your divine calling. You are not alone on this journey.


- Making sense of awakening symptoms and spiritual gifts

- Grounding and integrating expanded awareness

- Aligning your daily life with your highest spiritual truth

- Finding community and divine support along the path



Start Your Journey























Why Seek Divine Guidance


## What a Sacred SessionBrings Into Your Life


Each Holy Spirit-led reading is a sacred space of healing, clarity, and divine love — designed to meet you exactly where you are on your spiritual path.



- ### Peace After Confusion Receive divine clarity that dissolves mental fog and replaces anxiety with a deep, grounded sense of spiritual peace.

- ### Emotional Validation Feel truly seen and heard as the Holy Spirit confirms your emotions, your journey, and the sacred weight of what you've carried.

- ### Divine Confirmation Receive angelic messages and Spirit-led confirmation that you are on the right path — or gentle redirection toward your highest good.

- ### Energetic Release Shed energetic blocks, old wounds, and karmic weight through compassionate energy healing that restores your natural spiritual flow.

- ### Awakening Support Find grounded companionship and sacred guidance during your spiritual awakening — you are never alone in the unfolding.

- ### Soul Remembrance & Relationship Insight Reconnect with your soul's original purpose through past life insight and receive compassionate clarity for relationships and life direction.










Holy Spirit-Led









You are divinely guided, deeply loved, and never truly lost.

— Toni Love


























## Everything You Need to Know


Practical guidance so you can step into your session with peace and clarity.














### Session Formats


All sessions with Toni Love are offered remotely, bringing sacred guidance directly to you wherever you are. Live readings and healing sessions are conducted via Google Meet, creating an intimate, face-to-face spiritual connection from the comfort of your own sacred space. No travel required — only an open heart and a quiet moment to receive.


- Live video sessions via Google Meet

- Remote energy healing & soul guidance

- Private, confidential & deeply personal

- Available to clients worldwide














### Payment & Access


Booking is simple and secure. Sessions are processed through Stripe-supported payment options, accepting all major credit and debit cards for a seamless experience. Once your session is confirmed, you will receive your Google Meet link and any preparation guidance directly. Prefer to connect first? Reach out via WhatsApp for a gentle, personal conversation before booking.


- Secure Stripe-powered checkout

- All major credit & debit cards accepted

- WhatsApp available for pre-booking questions

- Confirmation & session link sent via email














### Best For


Toni Love's sessions are lovingly suited for souls at a crossroads — those seeking divine clarity, deep emotional healing, or confirmation that they are on the right path. Whether you are navigating a spiritual awakening, processing grief, searching for your soul's purpose, or simply longing to feel seen and guided by God's love, you are welcome here.


- Seeking clarity on life decisions & direction

- Navigating spiritual awakening or renewal

- Healing from grief, trauma, or loss

- Desiring confirmation & divine reassurance










Have a question before booking? Reach out via WhatsApp — Toni Love is here to walk with you.































## Ready to Begin Your Sacred Journey?


You don't have to walk the path of awakening alone. Whether you're seeking clarity, healing, or a deeper connection to your divine purpose, Toni Love is here to guide you with compassion, Holy Spirit wisdom, and loving spiritual insight. Reach out to explore which session best meets your soul's current needs — every step toward the light matters.


Book a Session
Contact Toni Love




Not sure where to start? Toni will help you choose the session that best aligns with your current spiritual needs and intentions.










Guiding souls toward clarity, healing, and divine alignment. Step into your sacred journey with compassion and light.

## Your Sacred Healing Journey Starts With One Message — The Sacred Seer Toni Love

URL: https://example.com/contact
Description: Ready to connect with a trusted spiritualist near you? Reach out to Toni Love and book your Holy Spirit-led reading or healing session at Milford&#39;s beloved spiritual center today.

Your Sacred Healing Journey Starts With One Message — The Sacred Seer Toni Love






























Skip to main content















- Home
- About
- Services



Contact
















Begin Your Sacred Conversation

# Reach Out & Begin Your Journey



This is your sacred space to begin a peaceful and aligned conversation. Whether you are seeking a Holy Spirit-led reading, have questions about spiritual guidance, or are ready to take your next step toward soul healing — Toni Love is here to receive you with open arms and an open heart.


Every inquiry is welcomed with care and intention. There is no rush, no pressure — only divine love meeting you exactly where you are. Reach out, and let the healing begin.












A Sacred Space Awaits You


Toni Love — Intuitive Healer & Spiritual Guide • Milford Spiritual Center





















## Reach Out & Begin Your Journey


Every sacred conversation begins with a single step. Share your heart, and Toni will meet you with compassion, clarity, and divine guidance.



















Your Name



Email Address





Phone Number  (optional)




Your Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy




Send My Message














### A Sacred Space to Be Heard


Toni reads every message with care and intention. You are not just sending a form — you are opening a divine conversation. Every soul who reaches out is welcomed with warmth and without judgment.











Response Time

Toni personally responds within 1–3 business days, holding your message in prayer before replying.









What to Mention

Feel free to share the type of guidance you seek — intuitive reading, soul healing, past life insight, relationship clarity, or spiritual awakening support.









Your Privacy is Sacred

All communications are held in complete confidence. Your spiritual journey is yours alone to share as you choose.









Prefer to connect directly?





























How to Connect


## Begin Your Sacred Journey


Every path to healing is unique. Here is everything you need to know before reaching out — clear, simple, and held with care.













### Session Requests



To begin, simply complete the inquiry form on this page. Share a little about what you are seeking — whether it is a Holy Spirit-led reading, soul healing, or angelic guidance — and Toni will personally review your request.


You will receive a response within 24–48 hours with available times and next steps. All sessions are held in a safe, sacred space of love and compassion.


- Intuitive & Holy Spirit-led readings

- Soul healing & past life insight

- Energy healing & angelic guidance













### Payment & Meeting Format



Payments are processed securely through Stripe, ensuring your transaction is protected and seamless. Once your session is confirmed, you will receive a payment link directly.


All sessions are conducted via Google Meet — a private, face-to-face video call from the comfort of your own sacred space. A meeting link is provided upon booking confirmation.


- Secure Stripe payment processing

- Private Google Meet video sessions

- Link sent upon booking confirmation












### Direct Messaging



Prefer a more immediate connection? Reach Toni directly through WhatsApp for quick questions, session inquiries, or simply to feel the energy before committing to a booking.


This is a warm, personal line — not automated. Toni responds with presence and care, honouring each message as a sacred point of contact on your path.


- Direct WhatsApp messaging

- Personal, non-automated responses

- Quick questions warmly welcomed









Send a Session Inquiry


























## Connect & Follow the Sacred Journey


Join Toni Love across the spiritual community for daily inspiration, healing messages, angelic guidance, and soul-awakening encouragement. Every post is a divine invitation to go deeper.



























✦ Weekly Blessing ✦

### Receive Weekly Angelic Guidance & Healing Messages


Each week, Toni Love channels messages of divine love, Holy Spirit wisdom, and angelic encouragement — sent directly to your inbox as a gentle reminder of your sacred worth and spiritual path.


Request Your Messages










Guiding souls toward clarity, healing, and divine alignment. Step into your sacred journey with compassion and light.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- About
- Services



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/28/2026



The Sacred Seer Toni Love ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: The Sacred Seer Toni Love

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice









Guiding souls toward clarity, healing, and divine alignment. Step into your sacred journey with compassion and light.

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- About
- Services



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 28, 2026



The Sacred Seer Toni Love is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: The Sacred Seer Toni Love

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.









Guiding souls toward clarity, healing, and divine alignment. Step into your sacred journey with compassion and light.

## Terms & Conditions

Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 28, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - The Sacred Seer Toni Love

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Spiritual Services provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


The Sacred Seer Toni Love provides Spiritual Services through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by The Sacred Seer Toni Love. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: The Sacred Seer Toni Love

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
